productDisplayName: Nike Men Air Max Turbulence+ 18 White Sports Shoes
description: Style NoteOffering superior cushioning and flexibility in a sporty design, the nike Air Max Turbulence+ 18 is ideal for neutral runners. With top notch cushioning and a visible Air Max heel, it's a great shoe for both the trail and for casual wear. What's even better is that this shoe is nike+ compatible, allowing you to use Nike+ products to clock your runs and calories in style.Product DetailsMesh upper for maximum breathabilityTargetted overlays for added support where you need it mostForefoot windows for additional support and to offer an athletic Fit and feelPerforated midfoot overlays for added shoe structure and ventilationLace-up system for snug, customised fitMeshed and padded tongue and collar for snug, breathable comfortSynthetic swoosh overlays on the sides for added shoe support and styleFull length Cushlon foam midsole for maximum cushioning and all-day comfortVisible Air Max unit in the heel for ultimate impact protection during heel-strikeFitsole footbed for padded all-day comfort, customised fit and enhanced support to the footRemovable footbed to accommodate an orthoticDurable, environmentally preferred rubber outsole in waffle pattern for maximum traction and grip on all terrainCarbon rubber under the heel for abrasion resistanceFlex grooves in the forefoot for flexible foot movement and for a smooth rideImpact guidance system for better energy return and impact protectionMaterial and CareMesh, syntheticWipe surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
